title: Maw (disambiguation)
content:
'''Maw''' may refer to one of the following:

*'''[[The Maw/Legends|The Maw]]''', a noted black hole cluster
*'''[[Maw Installation]]''', located in the Maw
*'''[[Maw (Dark Jedi)|Maw]]''', a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] who followed [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]]
*'''[[Maw luur]]s''', [[Yuuzhan Vong]] creatures
*'''[[Mouth/Legends|Mouth]]''', also referred to as a maw
*'''[[Thorn Maw]]'''

{{Disambig}}
